description_long: This shotgun features a robust, industrial design with a long, cylindrical barrel and a prominent muzzle. The body is composed of a mix of dark metal and lighter metallic components, with a visible cylindrical chamber beneath the barrel, likely for ammunition or gas storage. The stock is a distinctive reddish-brown color, shaped ergonomically for shoulder support, and is connected to a black, tubular frame. A black hose or cable runs from the rear of the stock to the main body, suggesting a specialized function or power source. The trigger area is protected by a rounded, metallic guard, and the overall construction appears rugged and utilitarian, suitable for heavy-duty urban use. The surface finish is mostly matte with some areas of slight sheen, and the shotgun exhibits a combination of modern and industrial aesthetics.
description: A rugged, industrial shotgun with a long barrel, cylindrical chamber, and a reddish-brown ergonomic stock, featuring a matte metal finish and a protective trigger guard.
description_view_0: Front view showing the circular muzzle and the alignment of the barrel, with the cylindrical chamber and stock partially visible behind.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the full length of the barrel, the cylindrical chamber, the reddish-brown stock, and the attached hose or cable.
description_view_2: Rear view focusing on the end of the stock and the alignment of the barrel, with the trigger guard and chamber less visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side view displaying the barrel, chamber, stock, and hose, mirroring the details of view 1 from the other side.
attribute_barrel_configuration: single-barrel, long cylindrical barrel with no visible ribbing or venting
attribute_trigger_guard_design: rounded, medium-sized metallic trigger guard with a smooth contour and no visible finger grooves
